meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How NavDhan collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

intro.heading: Privacy Policy
intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Kubar Protocol Private Limited ("NavDhan", "we", "us") collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information when you use our website and services. We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data responsibly.

sections.title: ಕನ್ನಡ
sections.body: ಕನ್ನಡ ಅನುವಾದ ಶೀಘ್ರದಲ್ಲಿ ಲಭ್ಯವಾಗಲಿದೆ. ಈ ಫೈಲ್ ಕನ್ನಡ ಸ್ಥಳೀಕರಣಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಒಂದು ಪ್ಲೇಸ್‌ಹೋಲ್ಡರ್ ಆಗಿದೆ.

sections.title: Scope and applicability
sections.body: This policy applies to all visitors, registered users, applicants, and partners who access NavDhan websites, mobile applications, APIs, or services. By using our services, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

items.heading: Identity and contact data
items.body: Name, email, phone number, PAN, Aadhaar (voluntary and regulated), and business address.

items.heading: Business data
items.body: GSTIN, business type, years in operation, turnover, and bank statements.

items.heading: Device and usage data
items.body: IP address, browser type, operating system, and pages visited.

items.heading: Communication data
items.body: Emails, chat logs, and call recordings made for quality and compliance.

items.heading: Directly from you
items.body: Information entered in application forms or shared with our team.

items.heading: From third parties
items.body: Credit bureaus, GST platforms, bank statement providers, and publicly available sources with your consent.

items.heading: Automatically
items.body: Cookies and analytics tools when you browse our website.

items.heading: Loan matching
items.body: To assess eligibility and present offers from partner lenders.

items.heading: Verification
items.body: To verify identity, business existence, and financial standing.

items.heading: Communication
items.body: To share application status, offers, and support responses.

items.heading: Compliance
items.body: To meet legal, regulatory, and audit requirements.

items.heading: Lender partners
items.body: Only when you choose to proceed with an offer and provide explicit consent.

items.heading: Service providers
items.body: Verification, cloud hosting, analytics, and communication providers under strict contracts.

items.heading: Regulators
items.body: When required by RBI, courts, or other competent authorities.

sections.title: Retention and security
sections.body: We retain personal information only as long as needed for the purposes above or as required by law, typically up to five years after the end of our relationship. We use encryption, access controls, and regular security reviews to protect your data.

items.heading: Access
items.body: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.

items.heading: Correction
items.body: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.

items.heading: Deletion
items.body: Request deletion subject to legal retention requirements.

items.heading: Withdraw consent
items.body: You can withdraw consent for optional data processing at any time.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

sections.title: Updates to this policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review it periodically.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies. Please see our Cookie Policy for details.
